{{Quote|Freedom is more than our dream. It is our inalienable right.|Aran Starfire|<ref name="Poly86">{{PolyhedronCite|86|The New Republic Campaign: Preparing to Move Beyond the Movies}}</ref>}}
'''Aran Starfire''' was a tall, lean [[Human/Legends|Human]] with silver-red [[Hair/Legends|hair]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was once a [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] army, but retired to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gellefon]] to escape the madness of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

==Biography==
Starfire was once a consummate soldier, but when he formed the [[Gellefon Freedom Fighters]] to free [[Gellefon]] from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] rule, he started to use his disciplined training in unorthodox ways. His goal was to create so much trouble for the Galactic Empire that it simply left Gellefon to find a better, less hostile [[Planet/Legends|world]]. He refused to believe that the Imperials would rather increase their presence than leave the planet, which was probably the wrong conclusion to come to.

When a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] led by [[Jade (mercenary)|Watcher]] and [[Borsk Fey'lya]] met members of his resistance group, they were brought before Starfire. The two groups agreed to work together to free the captured members of the [[Deep Ear]] faction from [[Pinnacle Keep]]. Starfire and his group would stage a diversion while the group of rebels would enter the facility and free the [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]]. Starfire and his group then kept the pressure on the Imperial troops as the Rebels fled the planet with the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] plans.
